titleZh: 以董事会中心治理重构下独立董事责任制度
titleEn: Reconstruction of the Independent Director Responsibility System under Board-Centric Governance
abstractZh: 讨论董事会中心治理下独立董事义务与责任的制度完善方向，结合中国公司实践反思董事会决策控制风险。
abstractEn: Discusses how independent director duties and liability should evolve in a board-centric governance model and how courts can calibrate control-risk standards.
